creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
rm          2012-03-18 19:17:12 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    .                    UPDATING 
    mail/dbmail          Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Added files:
    mail/dbmail/files    dbmail-imapd.in dbmail-lmtpd.in 
                         dbmail-pop3d.in dbmail-timsieved.in 
  Removed files:
    mail/dbmail/files    dbmail-imapd.sh.in dbmail-lmtpd.sh.in 
                         dbmail-pop3d.sh.in dbmail-timsieved.sh.in 
                         pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  - update to 3.0.2
  - pass maintainership to submitter
  - add LICENSE
  - drop optional dependencies on database backends - since 3.0 it's
    handled with libzdb
  - rename rc-scripts to .sh-less ones
  - add UPDATING entry for users, that want to stay with dbmail 2.2.x
  
  Please note, that committed patch is reworked version of originally
  submitted (missing deps added, rc-scripts renamed, NOPORTDOCS issue
  handled more completely, some plist fixes applied). Sorry for delay.
  
  PR:             164631
  Submitted by:   Alan Hicks <ahicks at p-o.co dot uk>
  Feature safe:   yes
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1216    +19 -1     ports/UPDATING
  1.48      +47 -80    ports/mail/dbmail/Makefile
  1.26      +2 -2      ports/mail/dbmail/distinfo
  1.1       +32 -0     ports/mail/dbmail/files/dbmail-imapd.in (new)
  1.5       +0 -32     ports/mail/dbmail/files/dbmail-imapd.sh.in (dead)
  1.1       +32 -0     ports/mail/dbmail/files/dbmail-lmtpd.in (new)
  1.5       +0 -32     ports/mail/dbmail/files/dbmail-lmtpd.sh.in (dead)
  1.1       +32 -0     ports/mail/dbmail/files/dbmail-pop3d.in (new)
  1.5       +0 -32     ports/mail/dbmail/files/dbmail-pop3d.sh.in (dead)
  1.1       +32 -0     ports/mail/dbmail/files/dbmail-timsieved.in (new)
  1.5       +0 -32     ports/mail/dbmail/files/dbmail-timsieved.sh.in (dead)
  1.3       +0 -29     ports/mail/dbmail/files/pkg-message.in (dead)
  1.3       +1 -1      ports/mail/dbmail/pkg-descr
  1.17      +46 -36    ports/mail/dbmail/pkg-plist
